title: dombeya acutangula var. palmata
intro: Dombeya acutangula var. palmata, also known as the Pink Cotton Tree or Pink Form of the Dombeya, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Dombeya acutangula var. palmata include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
